quote: The whole problem with the world is the fools and fanatics are always so sure of themselves, and wiser people are full of doubts. – George Bernard Shaw
fact: Jefferson invented the dumbwaiter, the monetary system, and the folding attic ladder.
joke: What do you call an elephant that doesn’t matter? An irrelephant.
